auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Zigpoll private API key sent in the Authorization header. Create or copy it from the Zigpoll dashboard under Integrations > Private Keys: https://docs.zigpoll.com/web-api.

actions.name: generate_survey_link
actions.description: Generate a unique trackable Zigpoll survey link for a poll.

additionalProperties.description: A metadata value accepted by Zigpoll.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata to attach to the generated survey activity.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime after which the survey link expires.

inputSchema.description: Input for generating a unique Zigpoll survey link.

url.description: The unique survey URL to distribute to a respondent.

activityId.description: The unique Zigpoll activity ID associated with the survey link.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Fetch the authenticated Zigpoll user object.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Zigpoll action.

accounts.description: Account IDs associated with the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

lastModified.description: Timestamp when the user was last modified.

actions.name: get_poll
actions.description: Fetch a Zigpoll poll by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching a Zigpoll poll.

outputSchema.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Zigpoll account objects available to the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Zigpoll action.

items.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: Zigpoll account objects returned by the API.

actions.name: list_participants
actions.description: List Zigpoll participants by account, poll, or slide with cursor pagination.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll participants by account, poll, or slide. Filter by accountId.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll participants by account, poll, or slide. Filter by pollId.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll participants by account, poll, or slide. Filter by slideId.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll participants by account, poll, or slide. Provide exactly one of accountId, pollId, or slideId.

items.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

endCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page.

actions.name: list_polls
actions.description: List Zigpoll polls for an account.

items.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: Zigpoll poll objects returned by the API.

actions.name: list_responses
actions.description: List Zigpoll responses by account, poll, or slide with cursor pagination.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

createdAfter.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or after this time.

createdBefore.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or before this time.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll responses by account, poll, or slide. Filter by accountId.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

createdAfter.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or after this time.

createdBefore.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or before this time.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll responses by account, poll, or slide. Filter by pollId.

startCursor.description: Cursor returned by Zigpoll for the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of objects to return. Zigpoll documents a maximum of 5000.

createdAfter.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or after this time.

createdBefore.description: JavaScript timestamp string for returning objects created on or before this time.

oneOf.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll responses by account, poll, or slide. Filter by slideId.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing paginated Zigpoll responses by account, poll, or slide. Provide exactly one of accountId, pollId, or slideId.

items.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

endCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page.

actions.name: list_slides
actions.description: List Zigpoll slides for a poll.

items.description: Raw Zigpoll object fields returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: Zigpoll slide objects returned by the API.
